name: Fractal Design Torrent E-ATX Computer Case - Black RGB Tempered Glass Light Tint - 2x Custom-made 180x38 mm PWM RGB Front Fans - 3x 140mm RGB Bottom Fans - Nexus 9P Slim PWM Fan Hub - USB 3.1 Gen2 Type-C - 2x USB 3.0 - HD Audio (FD-C-TOR1A-04)
